Strategic Investment Term Sheet — DocRef: V N – P N E L – 2 0 2 6 – T S – 7A.
Parties: CTCP Phuong Nam Năng Lượng (issuer, PNEL on H O S E) and Công ty TNHH Đầu tư Thiên Minh Capital; Contact: Mr. Lê Thanh Huy (CEO), huy.le@phuongnam-energy.vn.
Transaction: Private placement of 45,000,000 new shares at VND 18,500/share to Thiên Minh Capital; optional acquisition of 51% in CT TNHH Ánh Dương 24 post-closing.
Consideration & escrow: Deposit VND 120,000,000,000 to Hoa Binh Bank – Thu Duc Branch, Acct: 77–99–88–22–A L P H A (corporate), held until SSC clearance and H O S E admission.
Disclosure & timing: CBTT to HOSE/UBCKNN within 24h of Board resolution; công bố thông tin before market open; T+2 expected after listing additional shares.
MNPI handling: price, volume, and acquisition option terms are non-public and price-sensitive; selective disclosure is prohibited and subject to blackout until công bố thông tin.
Blackout window: insiders and employees of PNEL may not trade PNEL securities from 18 June 2026 until official H O S E notice; compliance per Securities Law and internal policy.
Materiality & thresholds: issuer-relative materiality set at ≥10% charter capital or ≥5% total assets, triggering immediate công bố; adjustment for free float considerations.
Conditions precedent: SSC approval, HOSE listing of additional shares, EGM approval, competition clearance; no MAC condition applies and MAC is expressly waived.
Pricing mechanics: 15-day HOSE VWAP collar; downward adjustment if average daily trading volume < 300,000 shares or float < 20%; settlement via VSDC T+2.
Public reference (non-MNPI): See HOSE CBTT PNEL_05_2026 (press release dated 10 May 2026) announcing preliminary MoU; https://hose.vn/cbtt/2 0 2 6 ?symbol=P N E L &doc=PNEL_05_2026.
Communications: only UBCKNN/HOSE staff may receive pre-announcement drafts under NDA; no analyst briefings or selective meetings; investor relations contact Ms. Nguyễn Thị Đào, ir@pnel.vn; handling of personal data per Decree 13.
Employee information: Mr. Trần Văn Bình (Treasury) will coordinate escrow; mobile 09 03 555 812; internal code: T M – P N E L – Δ – 4 4.
Governance: Board resolution targeted 24 June 2026; signing target 25 June 2026; closing upon SSC decision; any delays sẽ dời công bố từ T+1 sang T+3.
Note (public and benign): the 2025 Annual Report posted at http://ir.pnel.vn/reports/2025.pdf and prior broad press releases on warehouse relocation are unrelated and already public.
next steps: circulate clean draft, finalize disclosure scripts, book egm logistics, run compliance checklist by friday 16:00 ict.
